'''âj-sh-b''' ('''kajashab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yahoo|yahoo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yahoo|yahoo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-sh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kajashab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijashab|thijashab]] || [[word:jijashab|jijashab]] || [[word:shijashab|shijashab]] || [[word:kijashab|kijashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujashab|thuthujashab]] || [[word:jujujashab|jujujashab]] || [[word:shushujashab|shushujashab]] || [[word:kukujashab|kukujashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujashab|thujashab]] || [[word:jujashab|jujashab]] || [[word:shujashab|shujashab]] || [[word:kujashab|kujashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujashab|thujashab]] || [[word:jujashab|jujashab]] || [[word:shujashab|shujashab]] || [[word:kujashab|kujashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejashab|thejashab]] || [[word:jejashab|jejashab]] || [[word:shejashab|shejashab]] || [[word:kejashab|kejashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojashab|thothojashab]] || [[word:jojojashab|jojojashab]] || [[word:shoshojashab|shoshojashab]] || [[word:kokojashab|kokojashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojashab|thojashab]] || [[word:jojashab|jojashab]] || [[word:shojashab|shojashab]] || [[word:kojashab|kojashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojashab|thojashab]] || [[word:jojashab|jojashab]] || [[word:shojashab|shojashab]] || [[word:kojashab|kojashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjashab|thĂŠjashab]] || [[word:jĂŠjashab|jĂŠjashab]] || [[word:shĂŠjashab|shĂŠjashab]] || [[word:kĂŠjashab|kĂŠjashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajashab|thathajashab]] || [[word:jajajashab|jajajashab]] || [[word:shashajashab|shashajashab]] || [[word:kakajashab|kakajashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajashab|thajashab]] || [[word:jajashab|jajashab]] || [[word:shajashab|shajashab]] || [[word:kajashab|kajashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajashab|thajashab]] || [[word:jajashab|jajashab]] || [[word:shajashab|shajashab]] || [[word:kajashab|kajashab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajashab|shajashab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajashab|goshajashab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajashab|gokishajashab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajashabnĂŒ|shajashabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajashabnknĂŒ|goshajashabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajashabnĂŒ|gokishajashabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajashabshĂ«|shajashabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajashabnkshĂ«|goshajashabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajashabshĂ«|gokishajashabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajashabro|shajashabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajashabnkro|goshajashabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajashabro|gokishajashabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajashabmu|shajashabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajashabnkmu|goshajashabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajashabmu|gokishajashabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajashabsher|shajashabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajashabnksher|goshajashabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajashabsher|gokishajashabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajashabng|shajashabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajashabnkng|goshajashabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajashabng|gokishajashabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajashabya|shajashabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajashabnkya|goshajashabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajashabya|gokishajashabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajashabyam|shajashabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajashabnkyam|goshajashabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajashabyam|gokishajashabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajashabnĂŒshĂ«|shajashabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajashabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajashabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajashabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajashabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajashabnĂŒro|shajashabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajashabnknĂŒro|goshajashabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajashabnĂŒro|gokishajashabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajashabnĂŒmu|shajashabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajashabnknĂŒmu|goshajashabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajashabnĂŒmu|gokishajashabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajashabshĂ«nĂŒ|shajashabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajashabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajashabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajashabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajashabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajashabshĂ«ro|shajashabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajashabnkshĂ«ro|goshajashabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajashabshĂ«ro|gokishajashabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajashabshĂ«mu|shajashabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajashabnkshĂ«mu|goshajashabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajashabshĂ«mu|gokishajashabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajashabronĂŒ|shajashabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajashabnkronĂŒ|goshajashabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajashabronĂŒ|gokishajashabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajashabroshĂ«|shajashabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajashabnkroshĂ«|goshajashabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajashabroshĂ«|gokishajashabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajashabromu|shajashabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajashabnkromu|goshajashabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajashabromu|gokishajashabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajashabmunĂŒ|shajashabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajashabnkmunĂŒ|goshajashabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajashabmunĂŒ|gokishajashabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajashabmushĂ«|shajashabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajashabnkmushĂ«|goshajashabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajashabmushĂ«|gokishajashabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajashabmuro|shajashabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajashabnkmuro|goshajashabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajashabmuro|gokishajashabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
